sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمُزَارِعُ يَسْقِي بُسْتَانَهُ مِنَ النَّهْرِ الْقَرِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Farmer je natapao svoju baštu iz obližnje rijeke.
sentences.translationEn: The farmer used to water his orchard from the nearby river.

sentences.arabic: حَفَرَ قَنَوَاتٍ صَغِيرَةً لِيَصِلَ الْمَاءُ إِلَى كُلِّ شَجَرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Iskopao je male kanale da voda dođe do svakog drveta.
sentences.translationEn: He dug small channels so that water could reach every tree.

sentences.translation: Drveće je raslo i davalo mnogo voća.
sentences.translationEn: The trees grew and gave many fruits.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَ الْمُزَارِعُ الثِّمَارَ إِلَى السُّوقِ وَبَاعَهَا.
sentences.translation: Farmer je odnio voće na tržnicu i prodao ga.
sentences.translationEn: The farmer took the fruits to the market and sold them.
